name: Cream Cheese Burekas
recipeIngredient: A pinch of Ground white pepper
8 Sheets phyllo dough; cut into 3-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a bowl, mash the farmer's cheese with a fork until crumbly.
3. Mix in egg, cheddar cheese, cream cheese, salt, nutmeg, and white pepper. Blend well.
4. Brush each phyllo strip with butter and spread about 1 teaspoon of the cheese mixture in one corner.
5. Fold over like a flag to make a triangle, fold again to make a square, then fold a third time to make another triangle.
6. Using a pancake turner, place on a greased baking sheet. Brush the top with butter.
7. Repeat with the remaining filling and the remaining phyllo dough.
8. Bake for about 15 minutes until golden. Eat immediately or refrigerate and reheat the next morning.
Nutritional info per pastry: 47 cal; 2g pro, 3g carb, 3g fat (61%), 13mg chol, 80mg sodium
